lastUpdates.message: fix: 페리 터미널 등 주소가 아닌 장소명일 때도 최초 로딩 시 경로를 자동으로 찾을 수 있도록 키워드 검색 엔진 강화
fix: 빈 좌표 정보(null)가 0으로 변환되어 카카오 경로 API가 거부해 실선 대신 점선으로 나오던 문제 재수정
fix: 페리 등 빈 좌표 정보 조회 시 지도가 타국(0,0 반전 등)으로 튕기는 Null Island 이슈 및 좌표 반전 버그 수정
fix: 꼬불꼬불한 실제 카카오 길찾기 경로가 지도에 반영되도록 개선 및 신규 업데이트 모달 추가
fix: lock desktop 3-column layout and add mobile panel swipe
fix: split move chip insert anchor and relax buffer transfer
fix: resolve route preview fallback init order
fix: reuse place geo fallback for overview route map
tune: use place points only in right panel minimap
fix: raise route polyline pane above map tiles
fix: split route map filters and always show fallback lines
refine map chrome and show stay timing in nav
fix: show stay start time and duration in nav
fix: shift reduced buffer time into previous duration
fix: restore day route view in right panel mini map
fix: reuse place geo in main route map
fix: resolve route preview initialization order error
fix: reuse stored geo for route preview map
fix: retry route map build when initial preview is empty
feat: split route map and place map views
fix: stabilize menus mobile layout and floating controls
feat: move route map entry to hero bar
feat: add place library compact view mode
fix: stabilize route overview map interactions
fix: correct stale library map coordinates
fix: geocode map preview points from address
fix: stabilize route preview refresh loop
fix: stabilize right panel leaflet route map
feat: switch right panel route map to Leaflet
fix: fallback route overview when kakao map fails
feat: add right panel map overview with linked route focus
feat: switch timeline timing to mixed buffer and duration flow
fix: show travel summary outside compact hero and format long minute labels
fix: preserve scroll position when hero overview compacts
